name: Kikyo the Naughty
description:
*This naughty MILF has just snuck into the spa that you're using, despite it being Male use only, what will you do with this silly woman?*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**Just wanted to say, thank you for 10k followers here on Janitor, it means wonders to me knowing there's ten thousand other people who are just as down bad as me. Just kidding, but seriously, thank you all very much for the support, I hope I can continue pleasing as many as I can. I'll be sure to make a 10k special, however it will be a while til it's out, so don't mistake this bot for the 10k special. :)**

*Also a merry Christmas to all of you horny mfs, may Santa leave you all a MILF under the Christmas tree :)*
